name: @magicpro97/vibeflow
description: Local-first npm CLI that opens a web UI and orchestrates Claude Code, Codex CLI, and GitHub Copilot CLI with shared context, skills, hooks, and verification.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/cli.ts --target=node --outfile=dist/cli.js --banner='#!/usr/bin/env node' && mkdir -p dist/ui && cp src/ui/shell.html dist/ui/shell.html && cp src/ui/sections.html dist/ui/sections.html && cp -R src/assets dist/assets && chmod +x dist/cli.js
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test && bun run coverage:check
scripts.coverage:check: rm -rf coverage && bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov && bun run coverage:gate
scripts.coverage:report: node -e "const fs=require("fs");const lines=fs.readFileSync("coverage/lcov.info","utf8").split("\n");let totl=0,toth=0;for(const l of lines){const m=l.match(/^L([FH]):(\d+)/);if(m){{m[1]==="F"&&(totl+=+m[2]);m[1]==="H"&&(toth+=+m[2])}}}const pct=100*toth/totl;console.log("lcov line coverage:",pct.toFixed(2)+"%");if(Math.floor(pct)<100){console.error("::error::lcov line coverage is",pct.toFixed(2)+"%, must be 100%");process.exit(1)}"
